name: openmm-lj-pair-refined-multiseed-v1
description: A refined multi-seed OpenMM benchmark that performs a longer local search near the Lennard-Jones equilibrium to measure convergence reliability under a larger budget.
paper_hypothesis: With a tighter local search space around the known Lennard-Jones equilibrium and a larger evaluation budget, the agentic Autolab loop should repeatedly converge to near-reference energy gaps across multiple random seeds.

evaluation.reference_note: For a Lennard-Jones pair, the global minimum occurs at r = 2^(1/6) sigma and V(r*) = -epsilon.
